blockers: No public BlackRock-hosted BUIDL product page, prospectus, private placement memorandum, or full fund documentation was found in the current source set.
No public proof-of-reserves URL, reserve attestation cadence, detailed reserve breakdown, collateralization ratio, or latest audit report URL was found.
No public smart-contract audit report was found for the BUIDL contracts in the approved source set.
Custodian and auditor fields rely mainly on RWA.xyz and contextual media rather than a primary issuer/fund document.
warnings: BUIDL has strong issuer and legal signals through SEC Form D, BlackRock association, Securitize infrastructure, and Treasury/cash-equivalent reserve assets, but current public documentation is not sufficient for final institutional-grade classification.
BUIDL and BUIDL-I are separate token rows/contracts and should not be aggregated without an explicit aggregation rule.
AUM/Total Asset Value from RWA.xyz and TVL from DeFiLlama are different metrics and must not be summed.
Secondary market liquidity is limited despite large AUM/TVL; DeFiLlama reported 0 USD 24h volume at the recorded snapshot.
Transfer restrictions, whitelist controls, and proxy/admin controls require implementation-level review before final smart-contract scoring.

Minimum investment figures differ by source context: SEC Form D lists 100,000 USD minimum outside investment, while RWA.xyz/secondary context report higher operational access or redemption thresholds.
